name: E-8 standardized rule metadata: a rule file declaring every §2.1 metadata field with valid shapes passes rule-metadata-complete
command:
printf 'id: g-ts-300
type: problem
fixable: code
has_suggestions: true
deprecated: false
replaced_by: []
docs_url: https://example.test/rule
requires_type_checking: false
recommended: true
options_schema: {}
messages:
  default: "bad"
' > g-ts-300.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/rule-metadata-complete.sh" g-ts-300.yaml && echo complete 1>&2
